column17: I have a bit of pain in the left shoulder from the benching session on Friday
mid-back is sore from the conditioning session, a bit of lower back pain as well
grip is giving out, I was doing weighted pull ups the night before
left shoulder pain is getting worse, it's worse from Overhead press
hanging out until late, so I went to be unusually late
first day calling in sick, I have the flu
second day calling in sick, today I feel better
low quality workout because I had to cut it short
I woke up by myself after 7 hours even though usually I like to sleep in on the weekends. For training I wasn't really hyped and got tired after deadlifts
I failed weights that are typically doable, took too long and didn't finish my workout
couldn't Squat after Sumo, pain in the upper quad
still pain during Squat, can't go proper depth, might be Bulgarian SS
pain squatting, lower deadlift, skip BG squat for more leg extension
